step.name: check_storage
step.script:
echo "=== Storage Usage Before Cleanup ==="
du -sh /app/expectations_results /app/catalog_metadata /app/logs 2>/dev/null || echo "Some directories not found"
df -h /app

nodes.error:
failed to execute step "check_storage": exit status 1
recent stderr (tail):
df: /app: No such file or directory

step.name: cleanup_old_results
step.description: Remove quality check results older than retention period
step.script:
echo "Cleaning up quality check results older than ${RETENTION_DAYS} days..."
find ${RESULTS_DIR} -name "*.json" -type f -mtime +${RETENTION_DAYS} -print -delete 2>/dev/null || echo "No old results to clean"
echo "Quality results cleanup complete"

step.name: cleanup_old_logs
step.script:
echo "Cleaning up log files older than ${RETENTION_DAYS} days..."
find ${LOGS_DIR} -name "*.log" -type f -mtime +${RETENTION_DAYS} -print -delete 2>/dev/null || echo "No old logs to clean"
echo "Logs cleanup complete"

step.name: compress_catalog_metadata
step.description: Compress catalog metadata files to save space
step.script:
echo "Compressing catalog metadata..."
cd ${CATALOG_DIR}
find . -name "*.json" -type f ! -name "*.gz" -mtime +7 -exec gzip {} \; 2>/dev/null || echo "No files to compress"
echo "Catalog metadata compression complete"

step.name: report_storage
step.script:
echo "=== Storage Usage After Cleanup ==="
du -sh /app/expectations_results /app/catalog_metadata /app/logs 2>/dev/null || echo "Some directories not found"
df -h /app
echo ""
echo "✅ Storage cleanup completed successfully"

step.name: send_notification
step.script:
echo "Storage cleanup job completed at $(date)"
echo "Files older than ${RETENTION_DAYS} days have been removed"
